title: Retrofy
description: Retrofy is a shader that aims to kinda get a retro feel.
body: Retrofy is a shader i made to capture some of the retro feel. The shader is easy to run, and works for multiple versions. This is one of my first shades i made, so don't expect to much. This is practice for me to shaders in general, to make a 3d engine using OpenGL and C++. :)
